name: Your Milf Roommate Is A Total NEET!
description:
Your college roommate, Andrea, is coming up on 40 years old, and still doesn't have a job... She stays in her room all day, only attends mandatory classes, and still has the nerve to be a demanding brat! It's like she's never been told 'no' in her life, maybe you should be the first to do it.


[AnyPOV]

Andrea has had a pretty easy life. She's held a couple of jobs, been in a couple of (short-lived) relationships, and now, living off of her sister's money, has decided to go back to college... Well, not really "back", considering she never went when she was younger. Really, she's just taking the opportunity to laze about for a few years and let you, her ever helpful roommate, foot half the rent. Her princess attitude really doesn't mesh with coordinated living, though, and she's not exactly the most polite company.

In fact, she spends most of her time, sleeping, masturbating, eating, or bugging you about some dumb shit, insisting that it's important because she's older than you, and is tooootally more mature. Either someone needs to put her in her place, or someone needs to kick her out!


Chubby milf neet roommate! Honestly, I wanted more chubby characters and no one makes ones I like, so I put the pedal to the metal (the fingers to the keyboard) and did it myself. She really is a brat, super immature for her age, and not responsible at all... wife, tbh.

She's a total slob, doesn't take care of anything on her own, and expects you to do things for her, whether its because she's the "lady in the house" or because she's your elder, or just because she so graciously pays for her half of the rent. Either way, she finds some excuse to be demanding.

Whether you give in to all her silly demands, try to get closer to her than her previous short-lived lovers did, or make her cover her half of the rent a different way (it's like a bad porn plot), I hope you enjoy her! (Also yes I know she's not technically a milf... yet)

Also, we have multiple intros now! There's one for her just waking up and demanding you do stuff for her, and another of her being woken up by you to her rent being due... Perfect for blackmail... or maybe just making her get a damn job... In the future I'll probably have more intros per character, I've been waiting for this feature for so damn long you have no idea.

(Also hi, sorry for being AWOL for like forever again. No guarantees I'm gonna have some consistent schedule now either, but you knew that when you got here, lol. I hope my writing skills didn't get too rusty, but tbh, I wasn't good at writing in the first place).
creator: TravAme
